MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAY 11, 2015 REMAINS THE SAME BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES H. FLEMING, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT COOPER, DWIGHT RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HEATH, TERRANCE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, THE COURT IS UNABLE TO FIND BREACH OF CONTRACT TO PROVIDE LEGAL SERVICES ON ASSERTED GROUNDS OF ARGUMENTS WHICH COULD HAVE BEEN MADE ON PROCEDURAL GROUNDS. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday 9, 2015 in Department 525:
Dwight Cooper, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Gordon Cooper.
Terrance Heath, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Dwight Cooper testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - attorney/client fee agreement
Exhibit (B) - 12/15/2015 billing statement
Exhibit (C) - 02/1/2015 billing statement
Exhibit (D) - attorney fees and costs demand

Defendant/Appellant, Terrance Heath testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Nov. 13, 2015 TRO document from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 2 -document /plaintiff's ex parte application from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 3 - Nov. 24, 2014 filed Order from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 4 - OSC from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 5 - 12/2014 opposition from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 6 - Court Register of Action
Exhibit 7 - Opposition to OSC from case CGC-14-542602
Exhibit 8 - Jan. 14, 2015 Order Finding in TRO dated Nov. 13, 2014 from case CGC-14-542602

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem James Fleming; Clerk J. Kong; Matters Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Judgment Entered
